---
title: "prexorctl plugin new"
description: "Generates a new standalone plugin subproject under\njava/cloud-plugin/cloud-plugin-<name>/"
---

<!-- auto-generated by tools/gen-cli-docs.ts — do not edit by hand. -->

Generates a new standalone plugin subproject under
java/cloud-plugin/cloud-plugin-<name>/.
  --platform=paper|spigot|folia|velocity|bungeecord   required
  --mc-version=1.20|1.21                              paper only (default: 1.20)
  --name=<kebab>                                      kebab name; positional arg also accepted
  --package=<dotted>                                  default: me.prexorjustin.prexorcloud.plugins.<name>
The generated subproject:
  - applies the matching prexorcloud.plugin-<platform> convention plugin
  - contains one Java file: <Pascal>Plugin extends CloudPluginBase, with @CloudPlugin
  - is wired into java/settings.gradle.kts under the // ---- PLUGINS ---- // anchor
After scaffolding:
  cd java && ./gradlew :cloud-plugin:cloud-plugin-<name>:shadowJar
  # then drop the shaded jar from build/libs/ into a server's plugins/ folder.

## Usage

```text
prexorctl plugin new <name> [flags]
```

## Flags

```text
--author string        Author name written into the @CloudPlugin annotation (default: PrexorCloud)
        --description string   Plugin description, written into the @CloudPlugin annotation
        --dry                  Walk the scaffold and print what would happen without writing anything
        --force                Overwrite an existing plugin directory instead of failing
    -h, --help                 help for new
        --mc-version string    Minecraft API version for paper (1.20|1.21). Default 1.20. Ignored on other platforms.
        --package string       Override the generated Java package (default: me.prexorjustin.prexorcloud.plugins.<name>)
        --platform string      Target platform: paper|spigot|folia|velocity|bungeecord (required)
        --repo-root string     Path to the repo root (default: discovered upwards from the working directory)
```

## Global flags

```text
--ascii               Use ASCII glyphs only (no unicode box drawing, sparklines, etc.)
        --context string      Override active context for this invocation
    -c, --controller string   Override controller URL
    -j, --json                Output in JSON format
        --no-color            Disable colored output
    -t, --token string        Override auth token
    -v, --verbose             Show HTTP request/response details
```
